title: klight.yaml
description: klight service configuration — adds your service to a klight-managed environment.

name.description: Service name. Used as the Kubernetes service name and DNS hostname within the environment. Must be lowercase, DNS-safe (letters, numbers, hyphens).

port.description: Port your service listens on. klight creates a Kubernetes Service at this port.

health.description: HTTP GET path for health checks. klight polls this until it returns 2xx before marking the service ready.

image.description: Docker image to deploy. Use 'name:local' for local builds or 'registry/org/service:tag' for CI images.

manifest.description: Path to existing Kubernetes manifests (Kustomize overlay). When set, klight uses these instead of generating new ones. klight still manages infra (needs:) and injects sentinel for startup ordering.

needs.description: Infrastructure this service needs. klight spins these up in the environment namespace. Each entry maps to klight-catalog.yaml.

oneOf.description: Infra name from the catalog (local mode, default).
Infra with mode override (e.g. external for real infra).

mode.description: local = spin up StatefulSet. external = inject env vars pointing to real infra.

additionalProperties.description: Override env var values provided by this infra.

oneOf.description: Infra as a map (alternative syntax for mode overrides).

depends.description: Services/ports this service waits for before starting. klight configures the sentinel init container with these. Format: 'host:port' or 'host:port/health-path'.

env.description: Environment variables klight injects into this service's pod. Write the EXACT names your code already reads — no code changes needed. klight also auto-injects vars from declared needs (postgres host, kafka bootstrap, etc.).

build.description: Custom build configuration. Only needed if your project doesn't have a standard Dockerfile at the root (e.g. Gradle monorepo, Jib, SBT, Cargo with custom steps).

command.description: Shell command to build the Docker image. klight runs this instead of 'docker build'.

context.description: Working directory for the build command. Useful for monorepos where the build must run from the repo root.

tag.description: Docker image tag produced by the build command. Overrides the 'image' field for deployment.

migration.description: Database migration to run before the service starts. klight creates a Kubernetes Job that runs this command and waits for it to complete.

command.description: Command to run inside the service's Docker image to execute migrations.

version.description: Migration version label (for documentation, not enforced).

watch_paths.description: Paths to watch for changes when using 'klight watch'. Relative to the klight.yaml location. For monorepos, include all relevant source directories.
